title: Tables & Forms
summary: HTML tables for tabular data and forms for user input.

examples.title: Data table
examples.description: table with thead and tbody for structured data.

examples.title: Contact form
examples.description: form with labels, text input, and submit button.

examples.title: Contact form inside a page
examples.description: Purpose: Forms rarely sit alone—they belong inside a page with a title and surrounding content, like a real contact page. Output: A page header, intro text, and a contact form in the main area. Try: Add a textarea for a message field.

files.html:
Contact Us

Send us a message and we will reply within 2 days.

practice.description: Build a form with text, email, and a select dropdown for a favorite language.

starter.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Practice</title>
</head>
<body>
<form>
  <!-- your fields -->
</form>
</body>
</html>
